q: One _______ read the newspaper every day.

We _______ not really change a man's mind and heart with money.
Economics _______ difficult for the students of grade nine.
If you had worked hard, you _______ have passed.
Parents must _______ their children's leisure activities.
Keep the environment clean. Do not litter. You _______ follow rules.
In times of trouble you can always _______ your parents for help.

The public _______ feed the animals in a zoo.
There is _______ sugar in the tin for a cup of tea.
Sita is working hard these days. I think she _______ admission in a medical college.
The train is running late, we _______ for one hour.

passage: After __(a)__ a week in the cottage, he decided that he didn't really enjoy __(b)__ in the countryside and began __(c)__ of an excuse for __(d)__ the cottage.
Reading books __(a)__ a good hobby. Books open __(b)__ new world to us. They increase __(c)__ knowledge and change our outlook __(d)__ the world.
